plant.description: Source of Reserpine, used globally for hypertension.

method_1.method: Fine root powder often given with milk at night.

medicinal_uses: World-famous for reducing high blood pressure.
Used for anxiety, insomnia, and psychiatric disorders.

safety_profile.warning: Avoid in depression and cardiac weakness.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
